message:
feat(polyfills): add Buffer BigInt, process resource usage, setImmediate, util.styleText

Round 5 polyfill implementations in native Zig:
- Buffer: readBigInt64BE/LE, readBigUInt64BE/LE, writeBigInt64BE/LE, writeBigUInt64BE/LE
- Process: memoryUsage() returns {rss, heapTotal, heapUsed, external, arrayBuffers}
- Process: cpuUsage(prev) returns {user, system} in microseconds
- Globals: setImmediate/clearImmediate using setTimeout(fn, 0)
- Util: styleText(format, text) with ANSI escape codes for terminal styling
